title: Ponera modesta

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it beneficial for treating various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and wounds. In traditional medicine, Ponera is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
taxonomy: Ponera modesta is a species of ant in the family Formicidae. It belongs to the subfamily Ponerinae, which is a group of ants commonly known as "poreke" or "poney" ants.
